name: Antlers
recipeIngredient: 1 Pair White gloves (available at drug store)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut each glove into 2 sections, making a straight cut through the palm between the middle & ring finger.
2. Start with 3-fingered sections. Turn inside out.
3. Stitch the cut edges together. Turn right side out.
4. Stuff fingers with fiberfill, ensuring they are packed tightly and leaving a short section at the cuff unstuffed.
5. Wrap cuff tightly around headband.
6. Pin in place to the stuffed part of the glove.
7. Using double thread, stitch the cuff to the glove, pulling thread tightly so antlers stand up.
8. Repeat with other glove.
9. Paint.
10. Make bows from ribbons and stitch onto base of antlers.
11. Stitch a few bells in center of bows.
